reviews.review_description: A cracking little game and very addictive unfortunately does not work correctly with the samsung controller. When using right stick to move gun turret it also turns the ship. A shame its the only thing stopping me giving 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: Blast your way to the past on the Go!
reviews.review_description: I really enjoy this games simplistic and addictive gameplay. It is like playing the most fun version of Asteroids ever. The controls take a little time to become easy, but given practice the Go controller or the gamepad are great ways to enjoy this game.

This is a good fun little retro style game. 
Aim your gun by pointing your controller. 
Turn by use of touchpad. 
You are presented with asteroids and pirates that you must destroy to gain fuel and stay alive. 
Very clever use of control system make this a fun and enjoyable game.
Gain higher scores to unlock new ships and each ship is unique.
If you love retro games you will enjoy this. 
Well done to the developer. 😊
Very nice graphics and sound.  Hectic little space game and super fun!

I love twin stick shooters like geometry wars and super stardust. I was hoping this game would play like those. Unfortunately for me the left stick on a game controller just turns your ship left and right which is very different to the games I've mentioned and for me at least far less satisfying. The far bigger problem is that the controls are very buggy. The right stick which is supposed to control the direction of your shots also moves the ship. This means that right now the game is a mess and not fun to play with 2 sticks. It works OK with an oculus go controller but it's not a great expirience. Which is a shame because the graphics  are really good, a nice chunky retro pixel style  brought to new heights  with 3D ploygons. If the dev fixes the controls this could be great.

UPDATE: Hi Dev, thank you for your response.  I am using an XBOX One S Controller over Bluetooth and I am having the exact same issues as another reviewer here. If you could get it working I would be very grateful.

developer_response.body: What controller are you using? Some BT controllers are really a weird thing to deal with. Works with Xbox controller.
